description: Migration unit: hard-normalize all legacy `per_unit` values to `usage` and assert no residual rows.
API unit: reject create/update payloads that still submit `per_unit` after cutover.
Migration unit: create mode-default pricing table/indexes with tenant+service+mode+currency uniqueness.
Migration unit: one-way backfill populates mode-default pricing for all billable services.
Migration unit: one-way backfill fails fast when required source defaults are missing/invalid.
UI unit: fixed wizard picker includes services regardless of catalog billing method.
UI unit: fixed wizard picker still excludes products.
UI unit: hourly wizard picker includes services regardless of catalog billing method.
UI unit: hourly wizard picker still excludes products.
UI unit: usage wizard picker includes services regardless of catalog billing method.
UI unit: usage wizard picker still excludes products.
UI unit: template wizard fixed/hourly/usage pickers mirror decoupled behavior.
Server integration: fixed wizard submit accepts services with non-fixed catalog mode.
Server integration: fixed wizard submit still rejects non-service items.
Server integration: hourly wizard submit accepts services with non-hourly catalog mode.
Server integration: hourly wizard submit still rejects non-service items.
Server integration: usage wizard submit accepts services with non-usage catalog mode.
Server integration: usage wizard submit still rejects non-service items.
Action integration: contract line service attach allows based on line mode/context only.
Action integration: contract line service attach rejects when target line mode requirements are not met.
Integration: fixed mode prefill resolves from service+mode+currency defaults.
Integration: hourly mode prefill resolves from service+mode+currency defaults.
Integration: usage mode prefill resolves from service+mode+currency defaults.
Integration: explicit contract override supersedes catalog default (fixed/hourly/usage).
UI unit: contract-line service form shows effective mode and default source labels correctly.
Wizard resume: decoupled service selections and prefills survive save/resume cycle.
Template resume: decoupled service selections and prefills survive save/resume cycle.
Static guard: billing engine time query contains no unconditional null-line fallback clause.
Static guard: billing engine usage query contains no unconditional null-line fallback clause.
Billing integration: explicit contract_line_id time entry still bills through assigned line.
Billing integration: explicit contract_line_id usage record still bills through assigned line.
Billing integration: unassigned time entry with single eligible service-line match is allocated once.
Billing integration: unassigned usage record with single eligible service-line match is allocated once.
Billing integration: ambiguous unassigned time entry remains unresolved non-contract.
Billing integration: ambiguous unassigned usage record remains unresolved non-contract.
Billing integration: entry service missing from a contract line can never bill through that line.
Regression: hourly minimum/round-up behavior unchanged after allocation rewrite.
Regression: overtime/after-hours behavior unchanged after allocation rewrite.
Regression: usage minimum/custom-rate/tiering behavior unchanged after allocation rewrite.
Regression: bucket overage behavior unchanged after allocation rewrite.
Due-work integration: unresolved approved billable time appears as non-contract candidate.
Due-work integration: unresolved approved billable usage appears as non-contract candidate.
UI test: grouped automatic invoicing displays non-contract candidates as first-class children.
UI test: selecting only contract-backed children generates contract-only invoices.
UI test: selecting only non-contract children generates non-contract-only invoices.
Integration: compatible mixed contract/non-contract selection combines into one invoice.
Integration: PO scope mismatch across mixed selection forces separate invoices.
Integration: currency mismatch across mixed selection forces separate invoices.
Preview UI: mixed selection summary clearly states one-invoice vs multi-invoice outcome.
API integration: service catalog filters/sorts remain deterministic with decoupled semantics.
Shared layer integration: billing-clients service queries align with decoupled semantics.
Scheduling integration: time-entry service lookup no longer conflates service identity with billing mode.
Client portal integration: availability payload no longer uses billing mode as identity alias.
Product API integration: create/update writes canonical values only and rejects legacy values.
Schema test: service schema hard-cutover rejects legacy alias fields used for compatibility.
Schema test: product schema hard-cutover rejects legacy alias fields used for compatibility.
Schema/interface compile: financial + contract-line schemas/types compile with decoupled hard-cutover contracts.
Onboarding integration: created services/service-types no longer enforce identity-level billing-mode coupling.
UI test: changing service type in settings forms no longer silently rewrites billing behavior semantics.
Usage tracking UI test: picker behavior uses context rules instead of catalog-method gating.
Static guard: contract wizard actions contain no catalog billing-method eligibility rejection checks.
Static guard: contract line service actions contain no catalog billing-method eligibility rejection checks.
Static guard: scheduling and client-portal payloads contain no legacy `service_type` compatibility alias fields.
Migration integration: shared-contract simplification cloning preserves new mode-default structures.
E2E harness test: bootstrap does not reintroduce legacy billing-method constraints.
Branch-level DB-backed sanity suite: create contract, log unassigned time, invoice contract-only and non-contract-only paths successfully.
